chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-104 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.294/2022 2. For orders on CMA No.295/2022 3. For hearing of main case 07-06-2022 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2 & 3. Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing at some length does not press instant Constitutional Petition and states that the petitioner at the first instance shall approach to the concerned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace by filing Application u/s 22-A(iii) for redressal of his grievance with regard to neglecting of concerned SHO and Investigating Officer of their respective duties to arrest the nominated accused persons in the FIR lodged by the petitioner. Accordingly, instant Petition stands dismissed as not pressed leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievance. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
